function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0, x2: (T1, T1) -> T1, x3: T0, x4: T0) { not lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x0(x1(x3, x4)) = x2(x0(x3), x0(x4)) }[R, R](identity_fn[R], R.add, R.add, w0, w1)

function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.1) = T0.1 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) and x0(x1 * x2) = x0(x1) * x0(x2) }) = is_ring_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[R, R](identity_fn[R])

goal: is_ring_hom[R, S](g) = (g(R.1) = S.1 and forall(x0: R, x1: R) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) and g(x0 * x1) = g(x0) * g(x1) })
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.1) = T0.1 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) and x0(x1 * x2) = x0(x1) * x0(x2) }) = is_ring_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[S, R](g)

goal: is_ring_hom[S, T](f) = (f(S.1) = T.1 and forall(x0: S, x1: S) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) and f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) })
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.1) = T0.1 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) and x0(x1 * x2) = x0(x1) * x0(x2) }) = is_ring_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[T, S](f)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[R, S, T](f, g, R.1)

goal: compose[R, S, T](f, g)(a + b) = f(g(a + b))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[R, S, T](f, g, a + b)
is_ring_hom[R, S](g)
S.1 = g(R.1) and forall(x0: R, x1: R) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) and g(x0 * x1) = g(x0) * g(x1) }
function(x0: R) { forall(x1: R) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) and g(x0 * x1) = g(x0) * g(x1) } = true }(a)
function(x0: R, x1: R) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) and g(x0 * x1) = g(x0) * g(x1) }(a, b)
is_ring_hom[S, T](f)
T.1 = f(S.1) and forall(x0: S, x1: S) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) and f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) }
function(x0: S) { forall(x1: S) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) and f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) } = true }(g(a))
function(x0: S, x1: S) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) and f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) }(g(a), g(b))
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[R, S, T](f, g, a)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[R, S, T](f, g, b)

goal: compose[R, S, T](f, g)(a + b) = compose[R, S, T](f, g)(a) + compose[R, S, T](f, g)(b)
compose[R, S, T](f, g)(a * b) = f(g(a * b))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[R, S, T](f, g, a * b)
is_ring_hom[R, S](g)
S.1 = g(R.1) and forall(x0: R, x1: R) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) and g(x0 * x1) = g(x0) * g(x1) }
function(x0: R) { forall(x1: R) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) and g(x0 * x1) = g(x0) * g(x1) } = true }(a)
function(x0: R, x1: R) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) and g(x0 * x1) = g(x0) * g(x1) }(a, b)
is_ring_hom[S, T](f)
T.1 = f(S.1) and forall(x0: S, x1: S) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) and f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) }
function(x0: S) { forall(x1: S) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) and f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) } = true }(g(a))
function(x0: S, x1: S) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) and f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) }(g(a), g(b))

goal: compose[R, S, T](f, g)(a * b) = compose[R, S, T](f, g)(a) * compose[R, S, T](f, g)(b)
compose[R, S, T](f, g)(a + b) = compose[R, S, T](f, g)(a) + compose[R, S, T](f, g)(b) and compose[R, S, T](f, g)(a * b) = compose[R, S, T](f, g)(a) * compose[R, S, T](f, g)(b)

compose[R, S, T](f, g)(R.1) = T.1 and forall(x0: R, x1: R) { compose[R, S, T](f, g)(x0 + x1) = compose[R, S, T](f, g)(x0) + compose[R, S, T](f, g)(x1) and compose[R, S, T](f, g)(x0 * x1) = compose[R, S, T](f, g)(x0) * compose[R, S, T](f, g)(x1) }
proof: let w0: R satisfy { exists(k0: R) { compose[R, S, T](f, g, w0 + k0) != compose[R, S, T](f, g, w0) + compose[R, S, T](f, g, k0) or compose[R, S, T](f, g, w0 * k0) != compose[R, S, T](f, g, w0) * compose[R, S, T](f, g, k0) } }

let w1: R satisfy { compose[R, S, T](f, g, w0 + w1) != compose[R, S, T](f, g, w0) + compose[R, S, T](f, g, w1) or compose[R, S, T](f, g, w0 * w1) != compose[R, S, T](f, g, w0) * compose[R, S, T](f, g, w1) }

function(x0: R, x1: R) { compose[R, S, T](f, g, x0 + x1) = compose[R, S, T](f, g, x0) + compose[R, S, T](f, g, x1) and compose[R, S, T](f, g, x0 * x1) = compose[R, S, T](f, g, x0) * compose[R, S, T](f, g, x1) }(w0, w1)

function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.1) = T0.1 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) and x0(x1 * x2) = x0(x1) * x0(x2) }) = is_ring_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[T, R](compose[R, S, T](f, g))

goal: exists(k0: RingHom[R, R]) { RingHom.new[R, R](identity_fn[R]) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: T0 -> T1) { not RingHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: RingHom[T0, T1]) { RingHom.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](k0) } }[R, R](identity_fn[R])
function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: T0 -> T1) { RingHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) = is_ring_hom[T0, T1](x0) }[R, R](identity_fn[R])
function[T0: Ring] { is_ring_hom[T0, T0](identity_fn[T0]) }[R]
function[T0: Ring] { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T0]](identity_ring_hom[T0]) = RingHom.new[T0, T0](identity_fn[T0]) }[R]
let w0: R satisfy { identity_fn(w0) != identity_ring_hom[R].hom(w0) }

function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](x0) != RingHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[R, R](identity_ring_hom[R], identity_fn[R], w0)
function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1]) { is_ring_hom[T0, T1](x0.hom) }[S, T](f)
function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1]) { is_ring_hom[T0, T1](x0.hom) }[R, S](g)

goal: exists(k0: RingHom[R, T]) { RingHom.new[R, T](compose[R, S, T](f.hom, g.hom)) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: T0 -> T1) { not RingHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: RingHom[T0, T1]) { RingHom.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](k0) } }[R, T](compose[R, S, T](f.hom, g.hom))

function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring, T2: Ring](x0: RingHom[T2, T1], x1: RingHom[T0, T2]) { RingHom.new[T0, T1](compose[T0, T2, T1](x0.hom, x1.hom)) = Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](compose_ring_hom[T0, T2, T1](x0, x1)) }[R, T, S](f, g)
let w0: R satisfy { compose_ring_hom[R, S, T](f, g).hom(w0) != compose[R, S, T](f.hom, g.hom, w0) }

function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](x0) != RingHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[R, T](compose_ring_hom[R, S, T](f, g), compose[R, S, T](f.hom, g.hom), w0)

goal: lhs.hom = compose[R, S, U](compose_ring_hom[S, T, U](f, g).hom, h.hom)
proof: let w0: R satisfy { lhs.hom(w0) != compose[R, S, U](compose_ring_hom[S, T, U](f, g).hom, h.hom, w0) }

function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring, T2: Ring](x0: RingHom[T1, T2], x1: RingHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_ring_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[R, S, U](compose_ring_hom[S, T, U](f, g), h, w0)

goal: compose_ring_hom[S, T, U](f, g).hom = compose[S, T, U](f.hom, g.hom)
proof: let w0: S satisfy { compose_ring_hom[S, T, U](f, g).hom(w0) != compose[S, T, U](f.hom, g.hom, w0) }
function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring, T2: Ring](x0: RingHom[T1, T2], x1: RingHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_ring_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[S, T, U](f, g, w0)

goal: lhs.hom = compose[R, S, U](compose[S, T, U](f.hom, g.hom), h.hom)
rhs.hom = compose[R, T, U](f.hom, compose_ring_hom[R, S, T](g, h).hom)
proof: let w0: R satisfy { rhs.hom(w0) != compose[R, T, U](f.hom, compose_ring_hom[R, S, T](g, h).hom, w0) }

function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring, T2: Ring](x0: RingHom[T1, T2], x1: RingHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_ring_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[R, T, U](f, compose_ring_hom[R, S, T](g, h), w0)

goal: compose_ring_hom[R, S, T](g, h).hom = compose[R, S, T](g.hom, h.hom)
proof: let w0: R satisfy { compose_ring_hom[R, S, T](g, h).hom(w0) != compose[R, S, T](g.hom, h.hom, w0) }
function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring, T2: Ring](x0: RingHom[T1, T2], x1: RingHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_ring_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[R, S, T](g, h, w0)

goal: rhs.hom = compose[R, T, U](f.hom, compose[R, S, T](g.hom, h.hom))

proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: RingHom[T0, T1]) { x0.hom != x1.hom or x0 = x1 }[R, U](rhs, lhs)
let w0: R satisfy { lhs.hom(w0) != compose[R, S, S](identity_ring_hom[S].hom, f.hom, w0) }

function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring, T2: Ring](x0: RingHom[T1, T2], x1: RingHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_ring_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[R, S, S](identity_ring_hom[S], f, w0)
function[T0: Ring] { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T0]](identity_ring_hom[T0]) = RingHom.new[T0, T0](identity_fn[T0]) }[S]
let w0: S satisfy { identity_fn(w0) != identity_ring_hom[S].hom(w0) }

function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](x0) != RingHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[S, S](identity_ring_hom[S], identity_fn[S], w0)
function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: RingHom[T0, T1]) { x0.hom != x1.hom or x0 = x1 }[R, S](compose_ring_hom[R, S, S](identity_ring_hom[S], f), f)
let w0: R satisfy { lhs.hom(w0) != compose[R, R, S](f.hom, identity_ring_hom[R].hom, w0) }

function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring, T2: Ring](x0: RingHom[T1, T2], x1: RingHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_ring_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[R, R, S](f, identity_ring_hom[R], w0)
function[T0: Ring] { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T0]](identity_ring_hom[T0]) = RingHom.new[T0, T0](identity_fn[T0]) }[R]
let w0: R satisfy { identity_fn(w0) != identity_ring_hom[R].hom(w0) }

function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](x0) != RingHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[R, R](identity_ring_hom[R], identity_fn[R], w0)
function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: RingHom[T0, T1]) { x0.hom != x1.hom or x0 = x1 }[R, S](compose_ring_hom[R, R, S](f, identity_ring_hom[R]), f)
